message:
fix(codegen): Replace classInstance* anytype with direct method calls

Phase 9 of anytype monomorphization reduction:
- Replace classInstanceEq/Ne/Lt/Le/Gt/Ge runtime calls with direct __eq__/__lt__/etc. method calls when class has known method
- Use PyValue.from().eql()/lt()/gt()/le()/ge() fallback when method unknown
- Add isUniqueStringMethod helper for safe string dispatch on unknown types
- Fix closure_gen and closure_impl for Zig 0.15 compatibility

This eliminates O(n²) monomorphization from (TypeA, TypeB) combinations in classInstance* functions.
